# Dockier

> AI-native DevSecOps platform: connect repositories, scan vulnerabilities, analyze architecture with AI, and ship secure code from one platform.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Platform overview — security, AI analysis, and deploys unified.
- [Product](/product): Guided tour from connecting a repo to deploying a verified commit.
- [Features](/features): Security scanning, AI architecture analysis, sensitive data detection, dependency intelligence, AI remediation, and deployments.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free for OSS, Pro for teams, Enterprise for security-critical orgs.
- [Compare](/compare): How Dockier compares to Snyk, GitHub Advanced Security, SonarQube, and GitLab Security.
- [Security](/security): Our security posture, SOC 2, and data handling.
- [Docs](/docs): Product documentation.
- [Changelog](/changelog): Weekly release notes.
- [Blog](/blog): Engineering, security research, and product updates.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch.
- [Demo](/demo): Request a live walkthrough.

## Optional

- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
